distractor_quality.details: Lower distractor quality scores on easy/medium difficulty questions; distractors relied too heavily on incomplete-evidence and irrelevant-data strategies, lacking variety in error types

iterations.improvementMade: Enhanced distractor quality standards with new rules: diversity check ensuring distinct error strategies per question, temptation check requiring 5-10 seconds to eliminate each distractor, limits on repeated strategies (max 1 incomplete-evidence, max 1 irrelevant-data), and requirement for at least one data-reading error distractor

iterations.improvementMade: Added EASY-QUESTION DISTRACTOR REFINEMENT section requiring all distractors to reference the claim's key subject, use close-miss strategies, maintain structural parallelism, and avoid dead-giveaway eliminability.
